module.name: Search
module.param: | inputlookup data_types | stats values(data_type) as current_data_type

module.name: HTML
module.param: These current data types are marked as selectable in the UI for all users: $current_data_type$

module.name: Search
module.param: | tstats count WHERE `custom_index` [ | rest /servicesNS/-/-/configs/conf-sideview_data_types splunk_server=local | eval sourcetype=split(sourcetypes," ") | fields sourcetype | format ] GROUPBY sourcetype | append [ | rest /servicesNS/-/-/configs/conf-sideview_data_types splunk_server=local | eval sourcetype=split(sourcetypes," ") | rename eai:appName as app title as data_type | fields label sourcetype app data_type detail_view object_ids streaming_extractions ] | fillnull count | stats values(*) as * sum(count) as count values(sourcetype) as sourcetype by data_type app | eval comment="these three lines make cisco_cdr defer to any dupes from other Sideview SA apps" | eventstats dc(app) as overlap by data_type | search overlap<2 OR app!="cisco_cdr" | fields - overlap comment | rename count as events | fields label data_type app sourcetype events detail_view object_ids *

module.name: Button
module.module:
search $current_data_type$ | rename sourcetype as sourcetypes | fields - events | outputlookup data_types create_empty=false override_if_empty=false | eval message="The data types lookup has been updated"
$results[0].message$ "
